summary: The HVTN 702 trial did not demonstrate effectiveness of ALVAC-HIV as an HIV preventive measure; prior failure of similar candidates and lack of success in phase-3 testing indicate it lacked protective efficacy against HIV infection. This conclusion aligns with broader findings showing no approved or effective HIV vaccines currently available despite extensive research efforts.

This conclusion aligns with broader findings showing no approved or effective HIV vaccines currently available despite extensive research efforts.. Answer choice: B
